name: ebooklib

metadata.name: EbookLib
classifiers: Topic :: Software Development :: Libraries :: Python Modules
metadata.summary: Ebook library which can handle EPUB2/EPUB3 and Kindle format

documentation:
# About EbookLib EbookLib is a Python library for managing EPUB2/EPUB3 and Kindle files. It's capable of reading and writing EPUB files programmatically (Kindle support is under development). The API is designed to be as simple as possible, while at the same time making complex things possible too. It has support for covers, table of contents, spine, guide, metadata and etc. EbookLib is used in `Booktype `_ from Sourcefabric, as well as `sprits-it! `_, `fanfiction2ebook `_, `viserlalune `_ and `Telemeta `_. Packages of EbookLib for GNU/Linux are available in `Debian `_ and `Ubuntu `_. Sphinx documentation is generated from the templates in the docs/ directory and made available at http://ebooklib.readthedocs.io # Usage ## Reading ```py import ebooklib from ebooklib import epub book = epub.read_epub('test.epub') for image in book.get_items_of_type(ebooklib.ITEM_IMAGE): print(image) ``` ## Writing ```py from ebooklib import epub book = epub.EpubBook() # set metadata book.set_identifier("id123456") book.set_title("Sample book") book.set_language("en") book.add_author("Author Authorowski") book.add_author( "Danko Bananko", file_as="Gospodin Danko Bananko", role="ill", uid="coauthor", ) # create chapter c1 = epub.EpubHtml(title="Intro", file_name="chap_01.xhtml", lang="hr") c1.content = ( "

Intro heading

" "

Zaba je skocila u baru.

" '


' ) # create image from the local image image_content = open("ebooklib.gif", "rb").read() img = epub.EpubImage( uid="image_1", file_name="static/ebooklib.gif", media_type="image/gif", content=image_content, ) # add chapter book.add_item(c1) # add image book.add_item(img) # define Table Of Contents book.toc = ( epub.Link("chap_01.xhtml", "Introduction", "intro"), (epub.Section("Simple book"), (c1,)), ) # add default NCX and Nav file book.add_item(epub.EpubNcx()) book.add_item(epub.EpubNav()) # define CSS style style = "BODY {color: white;}" nav_css = epub.EpubItem( uid="style_nav", file_name="style/nav.css", media_type="text/css", content=style, ) # add CSS file book.add_item(nav_css) # basic spine book.spine = ["nav", c1] # write to the file epub.write_epub("test.epub", book, {}) ``` # License EbookLib is licensed under the `AGPL license `_. # Authors Full list of authors is in `AUTHORS.txt `_ file.

functions.name: ebooklib.epub.write_epub
documentation:
Creates epub file with the content defined in EpubBook.

```pycon
>>> ebooklib.write_epub('book.epub', book)
```

```
Args

name: file name for the output file

book: instance of EpubBook

options: extra opions as dictionary (optional)
```
WRITE

functions.name: ebooklib.epub.read_epub
documentation:
Creates new instance of EpubBook with the content defined in the input file.

```pycon
>>> book = ebooklib.read_epub('book.epub')
```

```
Args

name: full path to the input file

options: extra options as dictionary (optional)

Returns

Instance of EpubBook.
```
READ

documentation: TOC and navigation elements

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubException
documentation: Exceptions

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubItem

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubItem.__init__
documentation:
:Args:
  - uid: Unique identifier for this item (optional)
  - file_name: File name for this item (optional)
  - media_type: Media type for this item (optional)
  - content: Content for this item (optional)
  - manifest: Manifest for this item (optional)

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubItem.get_id
documentation:
Returns unique identifier for this item.

:Returns:
  Returns uid number as string.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubItem.get_name
documentation:
Returns name for this item. By default it is always file name but it does not have to be.

:Returns:
  Returns file name for this item.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubItem.get_type
documentation:
Guess type according to the file extension. Might not be the best way how to do it, but it works for now.

Items can be of type:
  - ITEM_UNKNOWN = 0
  - ITEM_IMAGE = 1
  - ITEM_STYLE = 2
  - ITEM_SCRIPT = 3
  - ITEM_NAVIGATION = 4
  - ITEM_VECTOR = 5
  - ITEM_FONT = 6
  - ITEM_VIDEO = 7
  - ITEM_AUDIO = 8
  - ITEM_DOCUMENT = 9
  - ITEM_COVER = 10

We map type according to the extensions which are defined in ebooklib.EXTENSIONS.

:Returns:
  Returns type of the item as number.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubItem.get_content
documentation:
Returns content of the item. Content should be of type 'str' (Python 2) or 'bytes' (Python 3)

:Args:
  - default: Default value for the content if it is not already defined.

:Returns:
  Returns content of the item.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubItem.set_content
documentation:
Sets content value for this item.

:Args:
  - content: Content value
Base class for the items in a book.
Items

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubCover
documentation: Represents Cover image in the EPUB file.

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.is_chapter
documentation:
Returns if this document is chapter or not.

:Returns:
  Returns book value.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.get_type
documentation:
Always returns ebooklib.ITEM_DOCUMENT as type of this document.

:Returns:
  Always returns ebooklib.ITEM_DOCUMENT

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.set_language
documentation:
Sets language for this book item. By default it will use language of the book but it
can be overwritten with this call.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.get_language
documentation:
Get language code for this book item. Language of the book item can be different from
the language settings defined globaly for book.

:Returns:
  As string returns language code.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.add_link
documentation:
Add additional link to the document. Links will be embeded only inside of this document.

```pycon
>>> add_link(href='styles.css', rel='stylesheet', type='text/css')
```

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.get_links
documentation:
Returns list of additional links defined for this document.

:Returns:
  As tuple return list of links.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.get_links_of_type
documentation:
Returns list of additional links of specific type.

:Returns:
  As tuple returns list of links.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.add_item
documentation:
Add other item to this document. It will create additional links according to the item type.

:Args:
  - item: item we want to add defined as instance of EpubItem

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.get_body_content
documentation:
Returns content of BODY element for this HTML document. Content will be of type 'str' (Python 2)
or 'bytes' (Python 3).

:Returns:
  Returns content of this document.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubHtml.get_content
documentation:
Returns content for this document as HTML string. Content will be of type 'str' (Python 2)
or 'bytes' (Python 3).

:Args:
  - default: Default value for the content if it is not defined.

:Returns:
  Returns content of this document.
Represents HTML document in the EPUB file.

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubCoverHtml

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubCoverHtml.is_chapter
documentation:
Returns if this document is chapter or not.

:Returns:
  Returns book value.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubCoverHtml.get_content
documentation:
Returns content for cover page as HTML string. Content will be of type 'str' (Python 2) or 'bytes' (Python 3).

:Returns:
  Returns content of this document.
Represents Cover page in the EPUB file.

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubNav

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubNav.is_chapter
documentation:
Returns if this document is chapter or not.

:Returns:
  Returns book value.
Represents Navigation Document in the EPUB file.

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubImage
documentation: Represents Image in the EPUB file.

classes.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.set_identifier
documentation:
Sets unique id for this epub

:Args:
  - uid: Value of unique identifier for this book

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.set_title
documentation:
Set title. You can set multiple titles.

:Args:
  - title: Title value

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.set_language
documentation:
Set language for this epub. You can set multiple languages. Specific items in the book can have
different language settings.

:Args:
  - lang: Language code

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.set_direction
documentation:
:Args:
  - direction: Options are "ltr", "rtl" and "default"

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.set_cover
documentation:
Set cover and create cover document if needed.

:Args:
  - file_name: file name of the cover page
  - content: Content for the cover image
  - create_page: Should cover page be defined. Defined as bool value (optional). Default value is True.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.add_item
documentation:
Add additional item to the book. If not defined, media type and chapter id will be defined
for the item.

:Args:
  - item: Item instance

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.get_item_with_id
documentation:
Returns item for defined UID.

```pycon
>>> book.get_item_with_id('image_001')
```

```
Args

uid: UID for the item

Returns

Returns item object. Returns None if nothing was found.
```

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.get_item_with_href
documentation:
Returns item for defined HREF.

```pycon
>>> book.get_item_with_href('EPUB/document.xhtml')
```

```
Args

href: HREF for the item we are searching for

Returns

Returns item object. Returns None if nothing was found.
```

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.get_items
documentation:
Returns all items attached to this book.

:Returns:
  Returns all items as tuple.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.get_items_of_type
documentation:
Returns all items of specified type.

```pycon
>>> book.get_items_of_type(epub.ITEM_IMAGE)
```

```
Args

item_type: Type for items we are searching for

Returns

Returns found items as tuple.
```

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.get_items_of_media_type
documentation:
Returns all items of specified media type.

:Args:
  - media_type: Media type for items we are searching for

:Returns:
  Returns found items as tuple.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.set_template
documentation:
Defines templates which are used to generate certain types of pages. When defining new value for the template
we have to use content of type 'str' (Python 2) or 'bytes' (Python 3).

At the moment we use these templates:
  - ncx
  - nav
  - chapter
  - cover

:Args:
  - name: Name for the template
  - value: Content for the template

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.get_template
documentation:
Returns value for the template.

:Args:
  - name: template name

:Returns:
  Value of the template.

methods.name: ebooklib.epub.EpubBook.add_prefix
documentation:
Appends custom prefix to be added to the content.opf document

```pycon
>>> epub_book.add_prefix('bkterms', 'http://booktype.org/')
```

```
Args

name: namespave name

uri: URI for the namespace
```
EpubBook
